name: Vectual
Vectual.BarChartStacked

values.name: viewBarChartStacked
values.comment:
Create SVG from bar chart config and several data sets.

    svgElement =
        viewBarChartStacked config dataSets

name: Vectual.BarChart

values.name: defaultBarChartConfig
values.comment:
The default configuration for the bar chart.
Create your own config by overwriting the fields you want to change.

    barChart =
        BarChart
            { defaultBarChartConfig
                | xLabelFormatter = utcWeek
            }
            timeData

values.name: getBar
values.comment: Helper to get SVG element for a single bar.
values.type: BarChartConfig -> Data -> MetaData -> Int -> Entry -> Svg msg

values.name: viewBarChart
values.comment:
Create SVG from bar chart config and a data set.

    svgElement =
        viewBarChart config dataSet
